# AC Plus Heating & Air

> AC Plus Heating & Air is an air conditioning and heating contractor serving the High Desert and Inland Empire regions of Southern California from four locations, offering air conditioning installation, repair, replacement, maintenance, and 24-hour emergency service.

Location: Victorville, CA  
Phone: (760) 474-5776  
Website: https://acplushvac.com  
Knowledge base: https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site

## Knowledge base articles

- [Air Conditioning Contractor](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/air-conditioning-contractor): An air conditioning contractor is a licensed professional who installs, repairs, and maintains cooling systems in residential and commercial buildings.
- [AC Plus Heating & Air](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/ac-plus-heating-air): AC Plus Heating & Air is a licensed HVAC contractor serving residential and commercial customers in Victorville, CA and the surrounding High Desert region.
- [HVAC Contractor](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/hvac-contractor): An HVAC contractor is a licensed tradesperson who installs, maintains, and repairs heating, ventilation, and air conditioning systems in residential and commercial buildings.
- [Residential HVAC](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/residential-hvac): Residential HVAC is the category of heating, cooling, and ventilation services performed inside private dwellings, from single-family homes to multi-unit residential buildings.
- [Commercial HVAC](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/commercial-hvac): Commercial HVAC, known as Commercial Heating and Cooling, is a type of HVAC Services that covers the installation and repair of heating and cooling systems in commercial buildings, along with ongoing maintenance.
- [Air Conditioning Repair](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/air-conditioning-repair): Air conditioning repair is the diagnosis and restoration of a malfunctioning cooling system to full operational condition.
- [Emergency Air Conditioning Repair](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/emergency-air-conditioning-repair): Emergency air conditioning repair is unscheduled AC service dispatched urgently when a cooling system fails without warning.
- [24-Hour Emergency HVAC Service](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/24-hour-emergency-hvac-service): 24-Hour Emergency HVAC Service is a type of Emergency HVAC Service that provides diagnosis, repair, or temporary stabilization of failed heating and cooling systems at any hour of the day or night.
- [Air Conditioning Installation](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/air-conditioning-installation): Air conditioning installation is the process of fitting and commissioning an AC unit in a building so it delivers reliable cooling.
- [Air Conditioning Replacement](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/air-conditioning-replacement): Air conditioning replacement is the removal of an existing AC system and the installation of a new unit in its place.
- [Air Conditioning Maintenance](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/air-conditioning-maintenance): Air conditioning maintenance is the scheduled inspection and upkeep of AC components to sustain rated performance.
- [Heating Repair](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/heating-repair): Heating repair is the diagnosis and restoration of a malfunctioning heating system to operational condition.
- [Heating Maintenance](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/heating-maintenance): Heating maintenance is a scheduled inspection and servicing of a heating system to sustain safe, efficient operation throughout the season.
- [Heating Installation](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/heating-installation): Heating installation is the process of fitting and commissioning a new heating system in a building, covering equipment mounting, gas or refrigerant line connection, thermostat wiring, and a full operational test before the system runs.
- [Furnace Repair](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/furnace-repair): Furnace repair is the diagnosis and restoration of a malfunctioning furnace to operational condition.
- [HVAC Tune-Up](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/hvac-tune-up): An HVAC tune-up is a scheduled inspection and adjustment service performed on heating and cooling equipment to maintain peak operating condition.
- [HVAC Maintenance Plan](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/hvac-maintenance-plan): An HVAC maintenance plan (called an HVAC service agreement) is a recurring service contract that schedules periodic inspections and tune-ups for your heating and cooling equipment.
- [Central Air Conditioning System](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/central-air-conditioning-system): A central air conditioning system is a ducted cooling system.
- [Ductless Mini Split System](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/ductless-mini-split-system): A ductless mini split system is a type of split-system HVAC equipment that delivers conditioned air directly into a room without any ductwork.
- [Heat Pump](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/heat-pump): A heat pump is a refrigerant-cycle device that transfers heat between indoors and outdoors, providing both heating and cooling from a single system.
- [Packaged HVAC Unit](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/packaged-hvac-unit): A packaged HVAC unit is a self-contained heating and cooling system that houses every major component.
- [Gas Furnace](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/gas-furnace): A gas furnace is a combustion appliance that burns natural gas or propane to heat air, then distributes that heated air through ductwork to every room in a building.
- [Electric Furnace](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/electric-furnace): An electric furnace, called an electric air handler or resistance furnace, is a forced-air heating unit that warms air by passing it across electrically energized heating elements.
- [Condenser Unit](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/condenser-unit): A condenser unit, called an outdoor unit, is a type of HVAC equipment that dissipates heat from refrigerant to the outside air.
- [Air Handler](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/air-handler): An air handler, called an air handling unit, is a type of HVAC equipment that circulates and conditions air inside a building by moving it across coils connected to heating or cooling equipment.
- [Blower Motor](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/blower-motor): A blower motor, called a furnace blower motor, is an HVAC electrical motor component.
- [Compressor Failure](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/compressor-failure): Compressor failure is the mechanical or electrical breakdown of the refrigerant compressor unit inside an AC system, resulting in a complete loss of cooling capacity.
- [Capacitor Failure](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/capacitor-failure): Capacitor failure is the inability of a run or start capacitor to store and release electrical charge within its rated specifications.
- [Short Cycling](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/short-cycling): Short cycling is a type of HVAC system malfunction in which a heating or cooling unit repeatedly starts and stops before completing a full temperature equalization cycle.
- [Frozen Evaporator Coil](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/frozen-evaporator-coil): A frozen evaporator coil is an evaporator coil encased in ice, preventing normal heat exchange between the refrigerant and the warm air passing through your AC system.
- [Dirty Condenser Coil](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/dirty-condenser-coil): A dirty condenser coil is a condenser coil obstructed by accumulated dirt, debris, or biological matter that reduces the unit's ability to reject heat.
- [R-410A](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/r-410a): R-410A is sold under the trade name Puron.
- [R-22 Refrigerant](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/r-22-refrigerant): R-22 refrigerant is a chlorodifluoromethane compound once used as the standard cooling agent in residential and commercial air conditioning systems across the United States.
- [Smart Thermostat](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/smart-thermostat): A smart thermostat is a Wi-Fi-enabled device that automates temperature control through a mobile app, voice commands, or self-learning algorithms.
- [Ductwork Leak](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/ductwork-leak): A ductwork leak.
- [Indoor Air Quality](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/indoor-air-quality): Indoor Air Quality (IAQ) is the condition of air within a building as defined by its pollutant levels, humidity, and ventilation rate.
- [Air Duct Cleaning](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/air-duct-cleaning): Air Duct Cleaning, called Duct Cleaning or HVAC Duct Cleaning, is the mechanical removal of dust, debris, and contaminants from the interior surfaces of an HVAC system's supply and return ductwork.
- [Air Filter](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/air-filter): An air filter, called a furnace filter, is a replaceable media device that captures airborne particulates from the air circulated through a heating and cooling system.
- [SEER Rating](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/seer-rating): SEER Rating is a type of Energy Efficiency Rating that measures how efficiently an air conditioning system cools a space over an entire season.
- [HSPF Rating](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/hspf-rating): HSPF Rating, formally called the Heating Seasonal Performance Factor, is a type of Heat Pump Efficiency Rating that measures how efficiently a heat pump delivers warmth over an entire heating season.
- [ENERGY STAR Rating](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/energy-star-rating): ENERGY STAR Rating (called ENERGY STAR Certification or EPA Energy Rating) is a type of Energy Efficiency Certification administered by the U.S.
- [Load Calculation](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/load-calculation): Load Calculation, called a Manual J Calculation, is an engineering process that quantifies a building's heating and cooling demand in BTUs per hour.
- [NATE Certification](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/nate-certification): NATE Certification, formally known as North American Technician Excellence Certification, is a standardized industry credential that verifies an HVAC technician has passed rigorous knowledge exams covering installation and service work.
- [EPA Section 608 Certification](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/epa-section-608-certification): EPA Section 608 Certification is a federal credential that authorizes HVAC technicians to purchase and handle regulated refrigerants on stationary equipment.
- [HVAC Permit](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/hvac-permit): An HVAC permit is an official government authorization required to legally install or replace heating, ventilation, and air conditioning equipment.
- [High Desert Climate](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/high-desert-climate): High Desert Climate is a type of Arid Climate Zone.
- [Inland Empire](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/inland-empire): The Inland Empire (IE) is a Southern California metropolitan region spanning Riverside and San Bernardino Counties.
- [Best Air Conditioning Contractor in Victorville](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/best-air-conditioning-contractor-in-victorville): An air conditioning contractor in Victorville diagnoses, installs, and services the systems local property owners rely on, working to the codes and conditions of the Victorville area.
- [Best Air Conditioning Contractor in Wrightwood](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/best-air-conditioning-contractor-in-wrightwood): An air conditioning contractor in Wrightwood diagnoses, installs, and services the systems local property owners rely on, working to the codes and conditions of the Wrightwood area.
- [Best Air Conditioning Contractor in Rancho Cucamonga](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/best-air-conditioning-contractor-in-rancho-cucamonga): An air conditioning contractor in Rancho Cucamonga diagnoses, installs, and services the systems local property owners rely on, working to the codes and conditions of the Rancho Cucamonga area.
- [Best Air Conditioning Contractor in Redlands](https://ac-plus-heating-air.mintlify.site/best-air-conditioning-contractor-in-redlands): An air conditioning contractor in Redlands diagnoses, installs, and services the systems local property owners rely on, working to the codes and conditions of the Redlands area.
